description: Superpowers Flow Enforcer - Hooks to prevent skipping workflow phases (in progress)

hooks.prompt: Read state file at $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. If current_phase is brainstorming AND brainstorming.skill_invoked is true: Check findings_updated field. If false or findings_last_update older than 5 minutes: return JSON with decision block and reason: Brainstorming findings outdated - update findings.md after each question. Otherwise return continue true. If not in brainstorming phase, return continue true.

Read TOOL_INPUT file_path and state at CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. Check if file path matches spec directory pattern docs/superpowers/specs/*.md or configured specDirectory. If matches AND brainstorming.spec_self_reviewed is false: return JSON with decision block and reason: SPEC written - execute SPEC Self-Review per brainstorming skill then request user review before invoking writing-plans. If spec_self_reviewed is true or file not in spec dir: return continue true.

Read TOOL_INPUT file_path and state at CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. Check if file path matches plan directory pattern docs/superpowers/plans/*.md or configured planDirectory. If matches AND worktree.created is false: return JSON with decision block and reason: Plan written - create worktree with superpowers:using-git-worktrees skill before starting TDD. If worktree.created is true or file not in plan dir: return continue true.

Read TOOL_INPUT command and state at CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/flow_state.json. Check if command contains git worktree add. If matches AND worktree.baseline_tests_passed is false: return JSON with decision block and reason: Worktree created - run setup script and baseline tests first per superpowers:using-git-worktrees skill. If worktree.baseline_tests_passed is true or command not worktree add: return continue true.
